title: MOSCOWcraft
description: a good selection of mods that make the game perfect without changing any game mechanics!
body:
This modpack aims to make the game as perfect as possible without changing too many game mechanics.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9e022e14029a7d2e4494a8f07994ec70ba34177.png)

There are three different versions available.

MOSCOWcraft Lite: 
this adds as few mods as possible but still enough to make the game more enjoyable. 

MOSCOWcraft Normal:
this adds as many mods as possible but also not too many so you can use it on a bad or normal computer.

MOSCOWcraft Deluxe:
this adds a lot of mods to make the game perfect, but is meant for a good computer

hope you like it!

   _(hotbar-switcher comes from this site: 
  https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hotbar-switcher)_
